refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time by optimizing load, travel, and dump operations to meet the customer-defined cycle time target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing it into sub-functions clarifies specific operational phases impacting cycle time, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure cycle time p95 under representative duty cycles and site conditions, verifying it meets or is below CT_target.

candidate_dps: Optimize load operation via automated control and sensor feedback
Optimize travel operation via route planning and speed control
Optimize dump operation via precise positioning and timing
selected_dp.selected_dp: Optimize load operation via automated control and sensor feedback; Optimize travel operation via route planning and speed control; Optimize dump operation via precise positioning and timing

potential_sources: Interdependence between load, travel, and dump timing
Shared sensor data and control algorithms
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically separable by operation phase but require coordinated timing; coupling is manageable with clear interfaces.

assumptions_risks: Assumes reliable sensor data and control responsiveness
Risk of timing delays due to network latency or mechanical faults
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit coordination DP or interface to manage timing dependencies if coupling issues arise.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for cycle time optimization including control algorithms and sensor integration

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Exchange sensor data and operational status between Vehicle and NGHE Solution

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Send operation commands to Vehicle for load, travel, and dump phases

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Receive safety alerts from Safety Services to adjust operations accordingly

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communication backbone for data exchange among modules

module_containment_scores.notes: Centralizes cycle time optimization logic and coordination; minimal diffusion.
Executes commands but does not contain optimization logic; moderate diffusion risk if logic is duplicated.
Primarily for remote control; low containment relevance for cycle time optimization.
Focus on safety alerts; no containment of cycle time logic.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Cycle time optimization logic is best centralized in NGHE Solution to minimize diffusion and ensure coherent control.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes overloaded
Dependency on reliable network link for timely command and telemetry exchange
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor performance and consider partitioning optimization logic if diffusion or latency issues arise.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes the cycle time requirement into manageable sub-functions; selected DPs logically address each sub-FR with acceptable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Risk of duplicating optimization logic in Vehicle or Teleoperation modules if not properly centralized
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Centralizing in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports ownership clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring cycle time metrics and monitoring interface data flows.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of cycle time optimization to NGHE Solution with defined interfaces to Vehicle and Safety Services.

recommended_revisions: Define explicit coordination interface if timing dependencies between sub-FRs become complex.
Establish performance monitoring to detect potential bottlenecks in NGHE Solution module.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and allocation meets the requirements and constraints with manageable risks; no immediate need to revise or further decompose.

revise.why: Current decomposition and allocation are adequate; future revisions may be triggered by performance or integration issues.

assumptions: Sufficient computational resources in NGHE Solution module
open_risks: Network latency impacting command and telemetry timeliness
Potential performance bottlenecks in centralized optimization logic
evidence_needed: Cycle time measurements under representative duty cycles
Performance metrics of NGHE Solution module during operation
